title: Transformers: Armada
synopsis: When tiny, powerful Transformers called Mini-Cons crash-land on Earth and the Moon, both Autobots and Decepticons race to collect them for their energy-boosting abilities. Three human teenagers become caught up in the conflict after accidentally reactivating a Mini-Con. As the war escalates, both sides discover that Unicron himself created the Mini-Cons to feed on the hatred generated by their battles, forcing longtime enemies to unite against a planet-sized threat.

episodes.title: First Encounter
episodes.synopsis: Teenagers Rad, Carlos, and Alexis accidentally activate a dormant Mini-Con on Earth, sending a signal that draws both Autobots and Decepticons to the planet.

episodes.title: Metamorphosis
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots arrive on Earth and establish contact with the human kids, while Megatron's forces launch their first assault to claim the Mini-Cons.

episodes.title: Base
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots set up their Earth headquarters and begin organizing their search for the scattered Mini-Con panels.

episodes.title: Comrade
episodes.synopsis: Hot Shot forms a bond with his Mini-Con partner Jolt as the Autobots and Decepticons clash over a newly discovered Mini-Con panel.

episodes.title: Soldier
episodes.synopsis: The search for Mini-Cons leads the Autobots into battle as Megatron demonstrates the power gained from Powerlinxing with his Mini-Con Leader-1.

episodes.title: Jungle
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con panel is detected deep in a jungle, leading to a treacherous race between the Autobots and Decepticons through dangerous terrain.

episodes.title: Carnival
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con signal is traced to an amusement park, creating a dangerous battle in a setting filled with innocent bystanders.

episodes.title: Palace
episodes.synopsis: The hunt for a Mini-Con takes the combatants to an ancient palace, where the artifact's resting place holds unexpected surprises.

episodes.title: Confrontation
episodes.synopsis: Tensions between the Autobots and Decepticons reach a boiling point as both sides deploy their full Mini-Con-enhanced power in a major clash.

episodes.title: Underground
episodes.synopsis: A Mini-Con panel is discovered in an underground cavern system, forcing both factions into a claustrophobic battle beneath the Earth's surface.

episodes.title: Ruin
episodes.synopsis: Ancient ruins hold a Mini-Con panel that could tip the balance of power, leading to a fierce confrontation among crumbling structures.

episodes.title: Prehistory
episodes.synopsis: A clip show that recaps the story so far while revealing new details about the ancient history of the Mini-Cons and their arrival on Earth.

episodes.title: Swoop
episodes.synopsis: A new Mini-Con discovery leads to an aerial battle as the Decepticons press their advantage in the skies.

episodes.title: Overmatch
episodes.synopsis: The Decepticons gain a temporary advantage with their growing Mini-Con army, forcing the Autobots into a defensive retreat.

episodes.title: Gale
episodes.synopsis: Harsh weather conditions complicate a Mini-Con retrieval mission as both sides battle the elements and each other.

episodes.title: Credulous
episodes.synopsis: Starscream's growing dissatisfaction with Megatron leads him to consider an unexpected alliance with the Autobots.

episodes.title: Conspiracy
episodes.synopsis: Political intrigue among the Decepticons deepens as Starscream plots against Megatron while the Autobots try to exploit the rift.

episodes.title: Trust
episodes.synopsis: Starscream temporarily defects to the Autobots, but Hot Shot and the others struggle to trust their former enemy.

episodes.title: Vacation
episodes.synopsis: The kids enjoy a brief respite from the conflict, but a Mini-Con detection soon pulls everyone back into battle.

episodes.title: Reinforcement
episodes.synopsis: New Autobot reinforcements arrive from Cybertron, including Jetfire, bolstering the team's strength against the Decepticons.

episodes.title: Decisive Battle
episodes.synopsis: A critical battle erupts over the three legendary Mini-Con weapons — the Star Saber, Skyboom Shield, and Requiem Blaster.

episodes.title: Vow
episodes.synopsis: Hot Shot makes a personal vow to protect his Mini-Con partners after witnessing the brutal way Megatron treats his own.

episodes.title: Rebellion
episodes.synopsis: Starscream's rebellion against Megatron reaches a climax as he makes a bold move to seize power for himself.

episodes.title: Chase
episodes.synopsis: A high-speed pursuit ensues as both factions race to intercept a Mini-Con panel before it falls into enemy hands.

episodes.title: Tactician
episodes.synopsis: The Decepticon strategist Thrust arrives and begins manipulating events from behind the scenes with his cunning tactical mind.

episodes.title: Linkup
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and Jetfire demonstrate the power of combining as they Powerlinx to face an overwhelming Decepticon assault.

episodes.title: Detection
episodes.synopsis: A clip show that reviews key events while the Autobots analyze patterns in the Mini-Con signal detections.

episodes.title: Awakening
episodes.synopsis: The Mini-Cons begin to awaken to their true nature and potential, hinting at a larger purpose behind their creation.

episodes.title: Desperate
episodes.synopsis: With the balance of power shifting toward the Decepticons, the Autobots launch a desperate counterattack to reclaim lost Mini-Cons.

episodes.title: Runaway
episodes.synopsis: A group of Mini-Cons attempts to flee from both factions, seeking their own freedom from the escalating war.

episodes.title: Past
episodes.synopsis: Revelations about the ancient past of the Mini-Cons emerge, shedding light on their original purpose and the forces that created them.

episodes.title: Past II
episodes.synopsis: Further exploration of the Mini-Cons' history reveals a shocking connection to the planet-eating entity Unicron.

episodes.title: Sacrifice
episodes.synopsis: A critical sacrifice is made to protect the Mini-Cons as the war takes a devastating personal toll on the Autobots.

episodes.title: Regeneration
episodes.synopsis: After a devastating battle, the Autobots regroup and rebuild, finding renewed determination to continue the fight.

episodes.title: Rescue
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots launch a daring rescue mission to save captured allies from the Decepticons' clutches.

episodes.title: Mars
episodes.synopsis: The battle moves to Mars as the combatants discover Mini-Con activity on the red planet.

episodes.title: Crack
episodes.synopsis: Cracks in the Decepticon alliance deepen as Thrust's secret agenda begins to surface.

episodes.title: Threaten
episodes.synopsis: Megatron makes dire threats against anyone who would betray him, but the seeds of rebellion have already been planted.

episodes.title: Crisis
episodes.synopsis: A major crisis forces both Autobots and Decepticons to confront the true threat that has been manipulating their war from the shadows.

episodes.title: Remorse
episodes.synopsis: Regret and remorse weigh heavily on both sides as the true cost of the war becomes apparent.

episodes.title: Depart
episodes.synopsis: The Transformers prepare to leave Earth as the conflict shifts toward Cybertron and the looming threat of Unicron.

episodes.title: Miracle
episodes.synopsis: An unexpected miracle provides the Autobots with new hope as they face seemingly impossible odds against Unicron.

episodes.title: Puppet
episodes.synopsis: Thrust is revealed to be a puppet of Unicron, having manipulated both factions to feed the chaos-bringer's hunger.

episodes.title: Uprising
episodes.synopsis: The Mini-Cons stage an uprising against their predetermined role as weapons, demanding their own freedom and autonomy.

episodes.title: Dash
episodes.synopsis: A race against time begins as Unicron starts to awaken and the combined forces scramble to mount a defense.

episodes.title: Drift
episodes.synopsis: The situation grows dire as Unicron's gravitational pull begins affecting nearby worlds and the heroes drift toward the final confrontation.

episodes.title: Portent
episodes.synopsis: Ominous signs herald Unicron's full awakening as the Autobots and Decepticons realize they must work together to survive.

episodes.title: Cramp
episodes.synopsis: Space around Cybertron warps under Unicron's influence, creating treacherous conditions for the combined Autobot-Decepticon fleet.

episodes.title: Alliance
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and Megatron forge an unprecedented alliance to face Unicron, combining their forces against the planet-eater.

episodes.title: Union
episodes.synopsis: The united Autobot-Decepticon force launches their assault on Unicron as the final battle for survival begins.

episodes.title: Origin
episodes.synopsis: The true origin of Unicron and the Mini-Cons is revealed as the heroes fight their way into the chaos-bringer's interior.

episodes.title: Mortal Combat
episodes.synopsis: In the epic finale, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice to unite the factions against Unicron, and the combined forces of Autobots and Decepticons battle to save the universe.

media.title: Transformers Armada Episodes by RoddiPrime - Dailymotion

facts: Armada was the first Transformers cartoon co-developed simultaneously in both the US and Japan, with the English version premiering six months before the Japanese broadcast.
The English dub was notorious for dubbing errors, including characters frequently being called by the wrong name, particularly the Mini-Cons.
Animation quality varied significantly between episodes due to rushed production schedules; some episodes were cleaned up for the later Japanese broadcast.
Armada launched the 'Unicron Trilogy' continuity, followed by Energon and Cybertron, marking the first interconnected multi-series Transformers saga since Generation 1.
Despite its technical flaws, the series was a massive commercial success and revitalized Transformers toy sales worldwide.
Starscream's sacrificial death in the finale is widely regarded as one of the most emotionally impactful moments in the entire Transformers franchise.
